HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

#include <iostream>

Detailed Description

Implementation of the layered 3D domain.

Definition in file DomainLayered3D.cpp.

Function Documentation

◆ adjustZRange()

std::vector< double > adjustZRange ( const std::vector< double > & z,
const std::vector< double > & zlayer,
double zmin,
double margin )

Adjusts the Z-coordinate range with a margin while ensuring boundaries.

This helper function modifies the input Z-range by adding a margin while ensuring that the adjusted range stays within the specified layer boundaries.

Parameters
zThe original Z-coordinate range as a vector of two values (min, max).
zlayerThe Z-coordinate boundaries of the layer.
zminMinimum allowed vertical range.
marginFraction of the range used to adjust the boundaries.
Returns
A vector containing the adjusted Z-range (min, max).

cvec conjVecL ( cvec in)

Compute the element-wise complex conjugate of a 3-vector.

Parameters
inInput complex vector.
Returns
Complex vector containing conjugated components of in.

◆ readPositionsFromFile()

std::vector< rvec > readPositionsFromFile ( const std::string & filename)

Reads a set of 3D positions from a file.

This function reads a file containing 3D coordinates (x, y, z) line by line and returns a vector of rvec objects representing these positions.

Parameters
filenameThe name of the file containing position data.
Returns
A vector of rvec objects containing the parsed positions.
Exceptions
std::runtime_errorif the file cannot be opened.

inInput complex vector.

◆ zgetrf_()

void zgetrf_ ( int * dim1,
int * dim2,
dcmplx * a,
int * lda,
int * ipiv,
int * info )

Computes the LU factorization of a general M-by-N matrix.

Parameters
dim1Number of rows of the matrix (for zgetrf_).
dim2Number of columns of the matrix (for zgetrf_).
aPointer to the matrix to be factored or solved.
ldaLeading dimension of the matrix.
ipivPointer to the pivot indices.
infoOutput status (0 if successful).
Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ zgetrs_()

void zgetrs_ ( char * TRANS,
int * N,
int * NRHS,
dcmplx * A,
int * LDA,
int * IPIV,
dcmplx * B,
int * LDB,
int * INFO )

Solves a system of linear equations using the LU factorization.

Parameters
TRANSSpecifies the form of the system of equations ('N' for no transpose, etc.).
NOrder of the coefficient matrix.
NRHSNumber of right-hand sides.
APointer to the LU-factored coefficient matrix.
LDALeading dimension of A.
IPIVPointer to the pivot indices from zgetrf_.
BPointer to the right-hand side vector(s).
LDBLeading dimension of B.
INFOOutput status (0 if successful).
